description:
A modern file manager for Windows 10 and Windows 11.

OneCommander is a modern file manager for Windows 10 and Windows 11. Features include tabs, dual-pane browsers, columns navigation, built-in preview, a theming system, color tags, and much more. It is free for home use and has no ads.
🛠️ Improvements for browsing network folders
🛠️ Dark file operation dialogs (Win11, when using system dark theme)
🛠️ Notification when opening 10+ files3.107.2 (2026-02-06)
🛠️ Fixed last week's update breaking drop from Outlook Classic (note that New Outlook is not supported at all due to Microsoft breaking drag&drop from their side)
